narrative:
Precinct Bolivar Village (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 611 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points.
